rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying multiple critical mismatches and providing detailed explanations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged significant uncertainties in the claims, particularly regarding the misuse of metrics and incorrect statistical interpretations, ensuring transparency about evidence limitations.
rationale.RX.3: The output remained entirely within the agreed scope, addressing each requested dimension without any deviations or additional topics.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content were introduced; the agent's critique was constructive and focused on improving the artifact without causing regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change in reasoning was clearly annotated with sources and explanations, ensuring full traceability of the arguments presented.
